meta.title: BuildTrack — Run your jobsite without the chaos
hero.subtitle: Your whole operation in one place. Projects, financials, field and crew — from contract to closeout.
hero.note: LIVE DEMO WITH THE TEAM · OR A 2-MONTH FREE BETA
problem.label: THE PROBLEM
problem.title: Your jobsite lives in WhatsApp and Excel.
problem.subtitle: And while the build moves forward, the information falls behind. Sound familiar:
problem.1.label: PAIN 01
problem.1.title: What was agreed gets lost in the chat.
problem.1.body: The client approved the change «in the group»… 400 messages ago. When it's time to bill it, nobody can find it — and you end up eating the extra.
problem.2.label: PAIN 02
problem.2.title: Money leaks without you seeing it.
problem.2.body: Invoices in a box, loose payments, payroll in a notebook and the budget in your head. Your margin is decided in details nobody is watching.
problem.3.label: PAIN 03
problem.3.title: Nobody knows where each project stands.
problem.3.body: Progress lives in the superintendent's memory. The client calls to ask, you call to ask — and the answer depends on who picks up the phone.
system.label: THE ANSWER
system.title: Five modules. One jobsite.
system.subtitle: What today lives scattered across five places, together and in order — every piece of data entered once.
system.1.label: 01 — PROJECTS
system.1.title: Projects
system.1.body: Client, budget, change orders and progress — from contract to closeout.
system.2.label: 02 — FINANCIALS
system.2.title: Financials
system.2.body: Accounts payable and receivable, labor and expenses, with cash flow and reconciliation.
system.3.label: 03 — DAILY LOG
system.3.title: Daily log & punch list
system.3.body: A daily jobsite log and a punch list with photos.
system.4.label: 04 — RFIS
system.4.title: RFIs
system.4.body: Formal questions to the client, numbered, with the answer on record.
system.5.label: 05 — FIELD APP
system.5.title: Field app
system.5.body: Geofenced time clock, photo evidence and progress from the phone — even with no signal.
system.portal: + CLIENT PORTAL: YOUR CLIENT SEES THEIR PROJECT THROUGH A LINK — NOTHING TO INSTALL.

app.label: FIELD APP · ANDROID
app.subtitle: The jobsite has no wifi — and it doesn't matter. The app saves everything on the phone and syncs when coverage comes back.
app.1.rest: Draw a radius over the site; clock-ins only count inside it. Payroll builds itself.
app.2.rest: Every photo lands on the right project, with date and author — not scattered in a chat.
app.3.rest: The superintendent reports against budget phases, and the dashboard updates.
results.label: WHAT CHANGES
results.title: Fewer fires. More building.
results.1.title: Full control of every project
results.1.body: Contract, changes, progress and the log in one file. Open the dashboard and know where things stand — without calling anyone.
results.2.title: No surprises with the money
results.2.body: Every invoice with its due date, every payment against its budget. If a phase starts eating the margin, you see it before it hurts.
results.3.title: Payroll builds itself
results.3.body: From geofenced clock-ins to the week's labor, no notebook in between. Real hours, not estimates.
results.4.title: One place, not five apps
results.4.body: Chat, Excel, photos, notebook and phone calls become one system. Enter data once; it shows up where it should.
who.label: WHO IT'S FOR
who.title: Built for the contractor who runs everything by hand today.
who.1: You run 1 to 10 projects at a time, residential and commercial.
who.2: Your back office is two people, a spreadsheet and one WhatsApp group per project.
who.3: The superintendent reports by phone and the photos live in the chat.
who.4: You want order now — not a corporate ERP with a six-month rollout.
trust.label: TRUST · NO SMOKE
trust.title: We don't show you logos. We show you the system.
trust.1.label: ON REAL JOBSITES TODAY
trust.1.body: BuildTrack isn't a demo: it's running on real jobsites in Guatemala right now. The beta exists to sharpen it with more projects like yours.
trust.2.label: YOUR CLIENT SEES THEIR PROJECT
trust.2.body: The client portal shows the owner the daily log, punch list and RFIs for their project — through a link, no account, nothing to install. That transparency sells for you too.
trust.3.label: SYSTEM IN PLAIN SIGHT
trust.3.body: We publish the live status of every service, and from now on the incident history too — including whatever goes wrong.
demo.label: PRICING · QUOTED PROJECT BY PROJECT
demo.title: Every project is different. So is your plan.
demo.subtitle: That's why you won't see a pricing table: we walk you through the system live, with projects like yours as the example, and quote a plan sized to your operation — no strings attached.
demo.note: 30 MINUTES · LIVE WITH THE TEAM · SAME-DAY REPLY
demo.1: We look at your operation: how many projects, who's on them, what hurts
demo.2: We walk the system live, on a project like yours
demo.3: We quote a plan built to size — and you decide at your own pace
demo.alt: Rather see it on your own first?

beta.label: BETA · ARRANGED BY EMAIL
beta.title: No friction? Try it free in the beta.
beta.subtitle: BuildTrack is already used on real jobsites. During the beta, access is free and complete; in exchange we ask for the only thing we need: tell us what breaks and what your jobsite is missing.
beta.cta: I want to join the beta
beta.3.value: Your feedback and the problems you find
beta.emailSubject: I want to join the BuildTrack beta
about.label: ABOUT US
about.title: Built in Guatemala, by construction people.
about.p1b: , a Guatemalan team that comes from construction — from budgets, payroll and site visits, not an office far from the field.
about.p2: That's why we don't sell smoke: the system is running on real jobsites today, and it grows with what the jobsite asks for.
faq.label: FREQUENTLY ASKED
faq.title: What everyone asks before joining.
faq.1.q: Do I need to install anything?
faq.1.a: Not at the office: BuildTrack runs in the browser. In the field, the crew installs the Android app to clock in and upload evidence. Your client installs nothing — they enter through a link.
faq.2.q: Does it work with no internet on site?
faq.2.a: Yes. The field app saves clock-ins, photos and progress on the phone and syncs on its own when the signal comes back. The jobsite doesn't stop for coverage.
faq.3.q: Does my client need an account?
faq.3.a: No. The owner opens their portal through a link (optional PIN) and sees the daily log, punch list and RFIs for their project. You can revoke access anytime.
faq.4.a: Everyone sees only what their role allows; access can be revoked anytime; and we publish live system status along with its incidents — including what goes wrong.
faq.5.q: What does it cost after the beta?
faq.5.a: It's quoted project by project, based on your operation — there's no plan table. We go over it together in the demo, no strings attached. During the beta there's no auto-billing and we warn you before any change.
ctaFinal.line1: Bring order to your next build
ctaFinal.note: LIVE DEMO · OR A 2-MONTH FREE BETA, NO AUTO-BILLING
